5. ACTIVITIES: Required - selected activities with costs. Present: Three activities listed (Yoga Retreat €40, City Walking Tour €20, Museum Day Pass €20) with individual and total costs (€80) ✓

6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: Required - any extra services with costs. Present: Two services listed (5-Day Prague Transport Pass €25, Airport Transfers €5) with individual and total costs (€30) ✓

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: Required - complete cost breakdown. Present: Detailed breakdown showing Flights (€150), Accommodation (€500), Dining (€140 with restaurant details), Activities (€80), Transportation (€30), and grand total (€900) ✓

All 7 required format items are present and fully specified with all necessary details including costs, dates, booking references where applicable, and complete breakdowns.
